summary: Complete verification of per-user frozen views on MASTER board. Backend API tests 11/11 passed. Frontend verification successful - auto-load, auto-save (debounced), and indicator text all working correctly.

feature_tested.name: Per-user frozen views on MASTER board
feature_tested.description: Each user's MASTER board configuration (filters, hidden columns, column order, grouping) is automatically saved and restored

endpoints.GET /api/user-view-config/MASTER: Returns saved config or empty object for authenticated user
endpoints.PUT /api/user-view-config/MASTER: Saves filters, hidden_columns, column_order, group_by_date per user

test_cases: test_07_non_master_board_empty - PASS (SCHEDULING, BLANK, TRIM all return empty)

frontend_playwright.master_board_indicator: PASS - 'Vista personalizada guardada' shows on MASTER board
frontend_playwright.non_master_indicator: PASS - 'Tablero Activo' shows on non-MASTER boards
frontend_playwright.config_restoration: PASS - Filters, group_by restored when switching to MASTER
frontend_playwright.group_by_selector: PASS - Group by dropdown works correctly

verification_evidence.master_board_screenshot: Shows MASTER board with 'VISTA PERSONALIZADA GUARDADA' indicator, active filters (LOVE IN FAITH, RUSH), and grouping by due_date
verification_evidence.non_master_screenshot: Shows MAQUINA1 board with 'TABLERO ACTIVO' indicator, no saved filters
verification_evidence.database_check: user_view_config collection stores: user_id, board, filters, hidden_columns, column_order, group_by_date, updated_at

features_verified: GET /api/user-view-config/MASTER returns saved config or empty object
PUT /api/user-view-config/MASTER saves all config fields correctly
Config is stored per user_id (different users get different configs)
Frontend auto-loads MASTER config when switching to MASTER board
Frontend auto-saves with 1.5s debounce when config changes
Config persistence: reload -> switch to MASTER -> config restored
Non-MASTER boards are NOT affected by auto-save behavior
Board indicator shows 'Vista personalizada guardada' when on MASTER
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test users with sessions and saved view configs for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-user MASTER board view config feature fully tested. Backend stores config in 'user_view_config' collection with compound key (user_id + board). Frontend useEffect loads config when currentBoard='MASTER', auto-saves with 1.5s debounce. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration23_user_view_config.py
